top_signals.title: Bitcoin's inflation quagmire gets stickier as renewed MidEast conflict sends oil price soaring
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Lawmakers probe growing use of Chinese AI models in U.S. companies
top_signals.summary: An ongoing House Committee investigation is probing the risks involved in the rise of AI built in China.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: State Bank of India Draws Over $1.5 Billion in Offshore Deposits
top_signals.summary: State Bank of India has so far raised more than $1.5 billion from foreign-currency deposits under a special program launched last month for overseas citizens, people familiar with the matter said.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
